```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./bar.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  b: () => (b),
  bar: () => (/* reexport module object */ _foo__rspack_import_0),
  c: () => (/* reexport safe */ _result__rspack_import_1.c)
});
/* import */ var _foo__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./foo.js");
/* import */ var _result__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("./result.js");
function b() {}





},
"./foo.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  a: () => (a),
  b: () => (/* reexport safe */ _bar__rspack_import_0.b),
  bar: () => (/* reexport safe */ _bar__rspack_import_0.bar),
  c: () => (/* reexport safe */ _bar__rspack_import_0.c),
  foo: () => (foo)
});
/* import */ var _bar__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./bar.js");
/* import */ var _result__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("./result.js");
const a = 3;
const foo = 3;




},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _foo__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./foo.js");

_foo__rspack_import_0.bar.a;
(0,_foo__rspack_import_0.c)();


},
"./result.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  c: () => (c)
});
/* import */ var _foo__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./foo.js");
/* import */ var _bar__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("./bar.js");
const c = 103330;





},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
